title: Anthropic introduces Claude Tag for Slack teams
friendlyTitle: Claude can now work inside Slack channels
summary: Anthropic launched Claude Tag, a beta feature for Claude Enterprise and Team customers that lets teams tag @Claude inside Slack channels. Claude can use approved tools and data, retain channel context, break tasks into stages, and work asynchronously in public threads.
friendlySummary: Anthropic made a new beta feature called Claude Tag. Teams can mention Claude in Slack and ask it to help with work using approved tools and information.
whyItMatters: The interface matters as much as the model: a shared Slack agent turns AI from a private assistant into a visible team workflow participant. For businesses, the practical questions now shift to permissions, auditability, and how much organizational context an agent should be allowed to remember.
friendlyWhyItMatters: This could make AI feel more like a teammate than a chatbot. It also means companies need clear rules about what the AI can see and do.
